name: pulse
description: A local-first LLM desktop chat app
author: suleiman <suleiman@example.com>

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,tsc,electron -c cyan,magenta,yellow "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json -w" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build
scripts.build:macos: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && electron-builder --linux
scripts.build:windows: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && electron-builder --win
